question: How do I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. Enter your registered email address and we'll send you a reset link. The link expires after 24 hours. If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder or contact support@cloudsyncpro.com.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To delete your account, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. You'll be asked to confirm by entering your password. Please note that account deletion is permanent and all your data will be removed within 30 days. You can export your data before deleting from Settings > Data Export.

question: What are the pricing plans?
answer: CloudSync Pro offers three plans: Free (up to 5 projects, 1GB storage), Pro ($12/month - unlimited projects, 50GB storage, priority support), and Enterprise ($49/month - everything in Pro plus SSO, audit logs, dedicated account manager, and 500GB storage). All paid plans include a 14-day free trial.

question: How do I get a refund?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. To request a refund, go to Settings > Billing > Request Refund, or email billing@cloudsyncpro.com with your account email and reason for the refund. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days to your original payment method.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal. For Enterprise plans, we also support invoicing and bank transfers. All payments are processed securely through Stripe. You can update your payment method at any time in Settings > Billing > Payment Methods.

question: What are the system requirements?
answer: CloudSync Pro is a web-based application that works on any modern browser. We support Chrome 90+, Firefox 88+, Safari 14+, and Edge 90+. For the best experience, we recommend a stable internet connection with at least 5 Mbps download speed. No software installation is required.

question: Is there a mobile app?
answer: Yes! CloudSync Pro has native mobile apps for both iOS (requires iOS 15+) and Android (requires Android 10+). You can download them from the App Store or Google Play Store. The mobile app supports all core features including real-time sync, file sharing, and notifications.

question: Do you offer API access?
answer: Yes, API access is available on Pro and Enterprise plans. You can generate API keys in Settings > Developer > API Keys. Our REST API supports all major operations including file management, user management, and sync operations. Full API documentation is available at docs.cloudsyncpro.com/api.

question: What integrations are available?
answer: CloudSync Pro integrates with Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Workspace, Jira, Trello, Zapier, and GitHub. Pro and Enterprise users can set up integrations in Settings > Integrations. We also support webhooks for custom integrations. New integrations are added regularly.

question: How do I export my data?
answer: To export your data, go to Settings > Data Export and select the data you want to export. You can export files, project metadata, and activity logs. Exports are available in ZIP format for files and CSV/JSON for metadata. Large exports may take up to 24 hours to prepare.

question: How do I contact support?
answer: You can reach our support team via email at support@cloudsyncpro.com, through the in-app chat widget, or by calling 1-800-CLOUDSYNC (1-800-256-8379). Free plan users get email support (48-hour response). Pro users get priority email and chat (4-hour response). Enterprise users get 24/7 phone, email, and chat support (1-hour response).

question: What is the uptime SLA?
answer: CloudSync Pro guarantees 99.9% uptime for Pro plans and 99.99% uptime for Enterprise plans. If we fail to meet the SLA, affected customers receive service credits. You can check real-time system status at status.cloudsyncpro.com. We perform scheduled maintenance on Sundays between 2-4 AM UTC with advance notice.

question: How does file syncing work?
answer: CloudSync Pro uses intelligent delta syncing, which means only the changed parts of files are uploaded or downloaded. Files sync automatically in real-time when changes are detected. You can also set sync preferences per folder. Conflict resolution handles simultaneous edits by creating versioned copies.

question: Is my data encrypted?
answer: Yes, all data is encrypted both in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Enterprise users can also enable client-side encryption with their own keys. We are SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant. Regular third-party security audits are conducted annually.

question: Can I share files with external users?
answer: Yes, you can share files and folders with anyone via shareable links. You can set permissions (view-only or edit), add password protection, set expiration dates, and limit the number of downloads. Shared links can be revoked at any time. Pro and Enterprise plans support custom branding on shared pages.
